_description: All preflight validation rules. Each rule was derived from a specific failure in the Oro Verde S1 simulation run.

cast_rules.description: No generic nouns as agent names
cast_rules.oro_verde_example: senators, cartels, family, woman were all created as agents
Walmart, criminal empire, DEA became agents

cast_rules.description: Dead characters must not be active posting agents
cast_rules.oro_verde_example: Carmen (dead) was agent #7 with highest influence_weight

cast_rules.description: No duplicate agents for the same character
cast_rules.oro_verde_example: Javier (agent 9) and Javier Cordero (agent 12) were both created

cast_rules.description: All mandatory characters must have individual agents
cast_rules.oro_verde_example: Benjamin, Karla, Isabela, Emilio, Ezequiel, Gabriela, Valeria all missing

config_rules.oro_verde_example: message_window_size=None caused 1M+ token prompts, $3/call, OOM crash
Unbounded tokens caused exponential cost growth to $450+

config_rules.description: No Chinese characters in config, topics, or narrative direction
config_rules.oro_verde_example: Hot topics, initial posts, narrative direction all generated in Chinese

config_rules.description: Simulation language must be explicitly set
config_rules.oro_verde_example: No language constraint led to Chinese/English/Spanish mix

document_rules.description: Upload document must be under 50,000 characters
document_rules.oro_verde_example: MiroFish truncates ontology analysis at 50K chars

document_rules.description: Upload document must be UTF-8 encoded
File format must be PDF, MD, or TXT (no DOCX)
